description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2022 Urban Range Rover Sport HST, 3.0 TC I6, 4WD, 395bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 339,000 or AED 5,311 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 49,965 KM's - 1 Year Blackline Warranty - Comes with 2 keys - Price includes VAT 
 URBAN Automotive Specifications: - 23" URBAN UC-4 Alloy Wheels - URBAN Carbon Fibre Front Bumper with Integrated Nolden Daytime Running Lights - URBAN Carbon Fibre Rear Bumper - URBAN Fixed Side Steps - URBAN Billet Aluminium Exhaust Tips - URBAN Bonnet Lettering - URBAN Tailgate Lettering - URBAN Rear Quarter Crest Badge - URBAN Pillar Authentication Badge - URBAN Tailgate Crest Badge - URBAN Front Grille Badge 
 - Panoramic Sunroof - Rear Camera - Blind Spot Warning - Lane Change Warning - Meridian Sound System - Chilled/Heated Seats Front Seats - Dual Zone Climate Control - Rear Seat AC - Electric Tailgate - Wired Apple Car Play/ Android Auto - Navigation - Ambient Lighting - Adjustable Suspension - Heads Up Display - Digital Speedometer - Keyless Entry - Push to start - Chilled Centre Console - Premium Metal Paddle Shifters - Soft Close Doors
